crew.description: Trained Helios Exobiologist. Brother to Booba, closeness of relationship unclear.

crew.description: Ex-Helios, legally changed name to ID after traumatic incident. Interest in art and Solarian religion.
Helios public outreach android, shows heavy traces of memory core manipulation. Has shown sympathy towards android rights activists in the past, keep an eye on them.
crew.name: R4V3N

crew.description: Atmos extraction vehicle pilot, licensed for crafts up to Class II, close to 3086. Not familiar with Hyperspace protocols yet, seeks training.
crew.name: RIVERS, C.
